name: mission-control-frontend
description: Production launcher for the Mission Control Next.js standalone server. The actual Next.js source lives at /app (single-package Next.js 16 fullstack). This shim exists so the standard Emergent supervisor template (which runs `yarn start` from /app/frontend on PORT=3000) can boot the prebuilt standalone server at /app/.next/standalone/server.js.

scripts.build: echo 'frontend shim: build is performed at /app (parent) via `pnpm/yarn build` — nothing to do here' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo 'no tests in frontend shim' && exit 0
